Drugs Approved for Lung Cancer

This page lists cancer drugs approved by the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for lung cancer. The list includes generic and brand names. This page also lists common drug combinations used in lung cancer. The individual drugs in the combinations are FDA-approved. However, the drug combinations themselves usually are not approved, although they are widely used.

The drug names link to NCI's Cancer Drug Information summaries. There may be drugs used in lung cancer that are not listed here.

On This Page

  • Drugs Approved for Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer

  • Drug Combinations Used to Treat Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer

  • Drugs Approved for Small Cell Lung Cancer

Drugs Approved for Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer

  • Abraxane (Paclitaxel Albumin-stabilized Nanoparticle Formulation)
  • Adagrasib
  • Afatinib Dimaleate
  • Afinitor (Everolimus)
  • Afinitor Disperz (Everolimus)
  • Alecensa (Alectinib)
  • Alectinib
  • Alimta (Pemetrexed Disodium)
  • Alunbrig (Brigatinib)
  • Alymsys (Bevacizumab)
  • Amivantamab-vmjw
  • Atezolizumab
  • Atezolizumab and Hyaluronidase-tqjs
  • Augtyro (Repotrectinib)
  • Avastin (Bevacizumab)
  • Bevacizumab
  • Binimetinib
  • Bizengri (Zenocutuzumab-zbco)
  • Braftovi (Encorafenib)
  • Brigatinib
  • Capmatinib Hydrochloride
  • Cemiplimab-rwlc
  • Ceritinib
  • Crizotinib
  • Cyramza (Ramucirumab)
  • Dabrafenib Mesylate
  • Dacomitinib
  • Docetaxel
  • Doxorubicin Hydrochloride
  • Durvalumab
  • Encorafenib
  • Enhertu (Fam-Trastuzumab Deruxtecan-nxki)
  • Ensacove (Ensartinib Hydrochloride)
  • Ensartinib Hydrochloride
  • Entrectinib
  • Erlotinib Hydrochloride
  • Everolimus
  • Fam-Trastuzumab Deruxtecan-nxki
  • Gavreto (Pralsetinib)
  • Gefitinib
  • Gilotrif (Afatinib Dimaleate)
  • Gemcitabine Hydrochloride
  • Gemzar (Gemcitabine Hydrochloride)
  • Imfinzi (Durvalumab)
  • Imjudo (Tremelimumab-actl)
  • Infugem (Gemcitabine Hydrochloride)
  • Ipilimumab
  • Iressa (Gefitinib)
  • Keytruda (Pembrolizumab)
  • Krazati (Adagrasib)
  • Lazcluze (Lazertinib Mesylate Hydrate)
  • Lazertinib Mesylate Hydrate
  • Libtayo (Cemiplimab-rwlc)
  • Lorbrena (Lorlatinib)
  • Lorlatinib
  • Lumakras (Sotorasib)
  • Mekinist (Trametinib Dimethyl Sulfoxide)
  • Mektovi (Binimetinib)
  • Methotrexate Sodium
  • Mvasi (Bevacizumab)
  • Necitumumab
  • Nivolumab
  • Nivolumab and Hyaluronidase-nvhy
  • Opdivo (Nivolumab)
  • Opdivo Qvantig (Nivolumab and Hyaluronidase-nvhy)
  • Osimertinib Mesylate
  • Paclitaxel
  • Paclitaxel Albumin-stabilized Nanoparticle Formulation
  • Pembrolizumab
  • Pemetrexed Disodium
  • Portrazza (Necitumumab)
  • Pralsetinib
  • Ramucirumab
  • Repotrectinib
  • Retevmo (Selpercatinib)
  • Rozlytrek (Entrectinib)
  • Rybrevant (Amivantamab-vmjw)
  • Selpercatinib
  • Sotorasib
  • Tabrecta (Capmatinib Hydrochloride)
  • Tafinlar (Dabrafenib Mesylate)
  • Tagrisso (Osimertinib Mesylate)
  • Tarceva (Erlotinib Hydrochloride)
  • Taxotere (Docetaxel)
  • Tecentriq (Atezolizumab)
  • Tecentriq Hybreza (Atezolizumab and Hyaluronidase-tqjs)
  • Tepmetko (Tepotinib Hydrochloride)
  • Tepotinib Hydrochloride
  • Trametinib Dimethyl Sulfoxide
  • Tremelimumab-actl
  • Vizimpro (Dacomitinib)
  • Vinorelbine Tartrate
  • Xalkori (Crizotinib)
  • Yervoy (Ipilimumab)
  • Zenocutuzumab-zbco
  • Zirabev (Bevacizumab)
  • Zykadia (Ceritinib)

Drug Combinations Used to Treat Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer

  • CARBOPLATIN-TAXOL
  • GEMCITABINE-CISPLATIN

Drugs Approved for Small Cell Lung Cancer

  • Afinitor (Everolimus)
  • Atezolizumab
  • Atezolizumab and Hyaluronidase-tqjs
  • Doxorubicin Hydrochloride
  • Durvalumab
  • Etopophos (Etoposide Phosphate)
  • Etoposide
  • Etoposide Phosphate
  • Everolimus
  • Hycamtin (Topotecan Hydrochloride)
  • Imdelltra (Tarlatamab-dlle)
  • Imfinzi (Durvalumab)
  • Lurbinectedin
  • Methotrexate Sodium
  • Nivolumab
  • Opdivo (Nivolumab)
  • Tarlatamab-dlle
  • Tecentriq (Atezolizumab)
  • Tecentriq Hybreza (Atezolizumab and Hyaluronidase-tqjs)
  • Topotecan Hydrochloride
  • Zepzelca (Lurbinectedin)
